title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates:
Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates!
